_schema._comment: Weaver Tree — Season 4+ progression. Sourced from LET's window.LEWeaverTree payload (game version 1.4.2 / tree payload version 10) with translations from /data/version142/i18n/full/en.json. Connections are derived bidirectionally from each node's `requirements` list (LET does not ship an explicit edges array).

id.notes: Stable internal id (e.g. `wv_7`). Matches LET's raw_node_id prefixed with `wv_`.

raw_node_id.notes: LET's numeric node id; used for stable ordering.

description.notes: Tooltip text. Contains LET i18n markers like `'{'Memory Amber'}'` — treat as plain text or strip in the renderer.

node_type.notes: One of `root`, `key`, `circle` (LET's CSS-class enum). `root` is the tree origin; `key` nodes are imprint slots; `circle` is every other node.

let_kind.notes: Identical to `node_type`; kept for provenance in case LET changes its scheme.

tier.notes: Always null; LET does not expose a tier field for the Weaver Tree.

x.notes: LET UI `rect[0]` pixel coord; origin at the root node. Layout-only.

max_points.notes: Maximum points allocatable. `0` only for the `root` node (non-allocatable marker); all other nodes are `>= 1`.

connections.notes: Neighbour node ids. Derived bidirectionally from `requirements`.

stats.notes: `value` is LET's tooltip string (e.g. `+10%`, `+1`, `-1`, `+0.1%`) or `null` for boolean-style flag stats (e.g. 'Guaranteed Unique Item').

ability_granted.notes: Always null for Weaver Tree; no node grants a named ability — `key` nodes grant imprint slots, described in `description`/`alt_text`.

icon.notes: LET sprite id (e.g. `a-r-797`). Maps to `.icons-r-NNN` CSS class in LET's weaver_ui asset.

requirements.notes: Raw LET requirement list preserved for debugging. `requirement` is the point threshold in the parent node. `connections` is the normalised bidirectional form.

alt_text.notes: Secondary tooltip text from LET; often reused keyword blurbs.

point_bonus_description.notes: Reserved by LET for per-point bonus text; currently null for every node.

known_inaccuracies_fixed_during_import: wv_24 'Super Arena Echo Chance' value came through as '34#' from LET's payload; normalised to '34%' (per-point).
wv_127 'Possessed Nemesis Chance' value came through as '34#' from LET's payload; normalised to '34%' (per-point).
Doubled apostrophes (e.g. "Weaver''s Will", "Zerrick''s Aid") from LET's SQL-style i18n export were collapsed to single apostrophes.

nodes.name: Weaver Tree
nodes.description: Beginning of the web

nodes.name: Shifted Knowledge
nodes.description: Echoes you discover on your echo web that would have had '{'Experience'}' rewards have a different random reward instead.

nodes.name: Giveaway Coins
nodes.description: Echoes you discover on your echo web that would have had '{'Gold'}' rewards have a different random reward instead.

nodes.name: Runic Diversion
nodes.description: Echoes you discover on your echo web that would have had '{'Rune'}' rewards have a different random reward instead.

nodes.name: Keyless Exchange
nodes.description: Echoes you discover on your echo web that would have had '{'Arena Key'}' rewards have a different random reward instead.

nodes.name: Rewritten Reality
nodes.description: Echoes you discover on your echo web that would have had '{'Glyph'}' rewards have a different random reward instead.

nodes.name: Vaulted Keychain
nodes.description: Your echoes have a higher chance to spawn with a new reward type which grants '{'Dungeon Keys'}' and '{'Dungeon Key Charms'}'.
nodes.alt_text: Chance is similar to Exalted item rewards. With 100% increased chance, the chance is equal to Exalted item reward type.

nodes.name: Elder Sap
nodes.description: You have a chance for your echoes to spawn with the '{'Memory Amber'}' reward type.
nodes.alt_text:
Chance is similar to Exalted item rewards. With 100% increased chance, the chance is equal to Exalted item reward type.

Memory Amber is the currency used to increased your rank with The Woven faction. It can be used to buy Woven Echoes and is needed to respecialize your Weaver Tree.

nodes.name: Entwined Spoils
nodes.description: Your echoes have a chance to spawn with a new reward type which grants '{'Woven Echoes'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Chance is similar to Exalted item rewards. With 100% increased chance, the chance is equal to Exalted item reward type.

Woven Echoes are echoes in the form of an item that can be placed on a Timeline Echo Web through the Altar of the Weaver.

nodes.name: Enthralling Bounty
nodes.description: Your echo rewards have a chance to be doubled on completion.

nodes.name: Tomes of Insight
nodes.description: You have a chance for experience tomes to drop when you complete an echo objective.

nodes.name: Golden Treasures
nodes.description: You have a chance for a pile of gold to drop when you complete an echo objective.

nodes.name: Echoed Inscriptions
nodes.description: You have a chance for a pile of '{'Glyphs'}' to drop when you complete an echo objective.

nodes.name: Runic Hoard
nodes.description: You have a chance for a pile of '{'Runes'}' to drop when you complete an echo objective.

nodes.name: Eclipsed Battleground
nodes.description: Arena echoes no longer appear on your echo web.

nodes.name: 8 Eyes in the Dark
nodes.description:
Beacons never appear.

Your echoes have a chance to contain additional spiderling packs.

nodes.name: Call of the Duellist
nodes.description: '{'Arena'}' echoes are more common on your echo web.

nodes.name: Gladiatory Crucible
nodes.description: Your '{'Arena'}' echoes have a chance to be replaced by more difficult '{'Super Arena'}' echoes, which contain additional '{'Champions'}'.
nodes.alt_text: Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Beacon of the Ascended
nodes.description: '{'Beacons'}' in your echo web have a chance to be replaced by '{'Super Beacons'}'.
nodes.alt_text: Super Beacons reveal echoes further than a normal Beacon, but are guarded by more dangerous enemies.

nodes.name: Commoner's Riches
nodes.description: Place a weapon or jewelry item to imprint it in this slot to have a small chance to drop a pile of similar items when killing enemies in your regular echoes.
nodes.alt_text:
Similar items are more likely to have the same rarity, sub type and affixes as the imprinted item. When imprinting a unique item, the similar items also have an increased chance of being the exact same unique.

Items dropped this way are affected by normal drop requirements and cannot be gifted without a resonance. They cannot include sub types, affixes, or uniques, that are not dropped by regular enemies.

nodes.name: Sealed Riches
nodes.description: Place an armor or weapon item to imprint it in this slot to have a chance to drop a pile of similar items when opening '{'Lost Caches'}' in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text:
Lost Caches are chests that contain lots of different valuable rewards.

Similar items are more likely to have the same rarity, sub type and affixes as the imprinted item. When imprinting a unique item, the similar items also have an increased chance of being the exact same unique.

Items dropped this way are affected by normal drop requirements and cannot be gifted without a resonance. They cannot include sub types, affixes, or uniques, that are not dropped by regular enemies

nodes.name: Echoing Riches
nodes.description: Place an armor or jewelry item to imprint it in this slot to have a chance to drop a pile of similar items as an extra reward when you receive echo rewards.
nodes.alt_text:
Similar items are more likely to have the same rarity, sub type and affixes as the imprinted item. When imprinting a unique item, the similar items also have an increased chance of being the exact same unique.

Items dropped this way are affected by normal drop requirements and cannot be gifted without a resonance. They cannot include sub types, affixes, or uniques, that are not dropped by regular enemies

nodes.name: Warlord's Riches
nodes.description:
Place an item to imprint it in this slot to make '{'Champions'}' sometimes drop a pile of items of the same item type that always have a sealed affix matching one of the affixes on the imprinted item. 

The tier of the sealed affix can roll up to the tier of the corresponding affix on the item. The number of items in the pile is equal to the number of affixes on the item.
nodes.alt_text: Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Woven Riches
nodes.description: Place a '{'Woven Echo'}' to imprint it in this slot for it to have a chance to spawn on your echo web when a new echo is generated.
nodes.alt_text:
Rarer Woven Echoes have lower chance to spawn.

Woven Echoes are echoes in the form of an item that can be placed on a Timeline Echo Web through the Altar of the Weaver.

nodes.name: Loomed Riches
nodes.description: Place a '{'Woven Echo'}' to imprint it in this slot for it to have a chance to spawn on your echo web when a new echo is generated.
nodes.alt_text:
Rarer Woven Echoes have lower chance to spawn.

Woven Echoes are echoes in the form of an item that can be placed on a Timeline Echo Web through the Altar of the Weaver.

nodes.name: Anchored Reality
nodes.description: You gain increased bonus '{'Timeline Stability'}' from killing enemies in your echoes.

nodes.name: Swift Trial
nodes.description: Your '{'Arena'}' echoes contain fewer waves.

nodes.name: Exiled But Not Forgotten
nodes.description: '{'Rune Prisons'}' have a chance to spawn two '{'Exiled Mages'}' inside your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Rune Prisons contain Exiled Mages.

nodes.name: Warden's Echo
nodes.description: Your echoes have a chance to spawn a rare enemy alongside a pack from a specific dungeon, that drop that dungeon's respective key and have a chance to drop the respective dungeon boss's unique items.

stats.key: Rare And Dungeon Enemy Pack Chance

nodes.name: Woven Treasures
nodes.description: Rare enemies in your echoes have a chance to drop a '{'Weaver's Will'}' item.

stats.key: Chance To Drop Weaver's Will Item

nodes.name: Zerrick's Aid
nodes.description: You have a 7% chance for '{'Zerrick'}' to join you in your echoes, who fights alongside you and increases your gold drops significantly.

nodes.name: Fated Nemesis
nodes.description: '{'Nemesis'}' encounters are more common in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Nemeses are encounters that you can choose interact with and fight to claim their items.

nodes.name: Exalted Find
nodes.description: '{'Lost Caches'}' drop an additional exalted item in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Caches are found throughout Eterra and the Monolith and when opened offer great rewards.

nodes.name: Gift of Allegiance
nodes.description: You have a chance for '{'Favor Caches'}' to spawn in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Caches are found throughout Eterra and the Monolith and when opened offer great rewards.

nodes.name: Twinned Tyrants
nodes.description: Boss objective echoes have a chance to contain two bosses instead of one. They deal more damage, have more health, and drop an additional unique item when slain.

nodes.name: The Abyssal Trap
nodes.description:
A random '{'Shade of Orobyss'}' can sometimes ambush you in your echoes.

This Shade has normal item drops and it scales off of distance, like any other Shade.
nodes.alt_text: Killing this '{'Shade of Orobyss'}' does not grant any corruption or reset your timeline.

nodes.name: Fury and Fortune
nodes.description: All rare enemies are permanently '{'Enraged'}', but they drop additional '{'Runes'}' and '{'Glyphs'}'.
nodes.alt_text: Enraged enemies have 35% increased movement speend and 60% increased attack and cast speed.

nodes.name: Purged Horizon
nodes.description: Killing '{'Shades of Orobyss'}' no longer grants corruption in your Timelines.

nodes.name: Outrider Souls
nodes.description:
Bosses and rare enemies in your echoes have a chance to be possessed by '{'Souls of the Erased'}'.

Additionally, some enemies in the last wave of your '{'Arena Echoes'}' have a chance to be possessed by '{'Souls of the Erased'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

Memory Amber can be spend to buy Woven Echoes and increase your Weaver Faction rank.

nodes.name: Prime Weaver
nodes.description: '{'Weaver's Will'}' value in unique items found in your echoes has a chance to be rolled twice and keep the higher value.

nodes.name: Forsaken Weaponry
nodes.description: When a '{'Nemesis'}' escapes through a portal after being '{'Empowered'}', it drops exalted weapons that can be upgraded if you kill a '{'Harbinger'}'.
nodes.alt_text: Nemeses are encounters that you can choose interact with and fight to claim their items.

nodes.name: Memories of Fortune
nodes.description: You have increased drop rate of '{'Memory Amber'}' in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Memory Amber is the currency used to increased your rank with The Woven faction. It can be used to buy Woven Echoes and is needed to respecialize your Weaver Tree.

nodes.name: Opulent Usurpers
nodes.description: '{'Exiled Mages'}' in your echoes have a chance to drop a pile of items with +level of skill affixes.
nodes.alt_text: Exiled Mages are powerful mages. Free them and slay them to take their experimental items.

nodes.name: Call of the Firstborn
nodes.description: When a '{'Boss Woven Echo'}' drops it has a chance to be duplicated.
nodes.alt_text: Woven Echoes are echoes in the form of an item that can be placed on a Timeline Echo Web through the Altar of the Weaver.

nodes.name: Graveborn Paths
nodes.description: '{'Cemeteries'}' are more common on your echo web.
nodes.alt_text: Cemeteries contain an Altar to the Weaver, where you can insert Woven Echoes into your current Echo Web. In Cemeteries you can collect Memory Amber as well as a Woven Echo when defeating the Altar Guardian boss.

nodes.name: Grand Catacombs
nodes.description: '{'Tombs of the Erased'}' are more common on your echo web.
nodes.alt_text: Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

nodes.name: Burial Grounds
nodes.description: Your '{'Tombs'}' and '{'Cemeteries'}' have increased monster pack size.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

Cemeteries contain an Altar to the Weaver, where you can insert Woven Echoes into your current Echo Web. In Cemeteries you can collect Memory Amber as well as a Woven Echo when defeating the Altar Guardian boss.

nodes.name: Hallowed Depths
nodes.description:
Your '{'Tombs of the Erased'}' have increased packsize.
Your '{'Arena'}' echoes have increased packsize.
Your '{'Arena'}' echoes drop '{'Memory Amber'}' on completion.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

Memory Amber is the currency used to increased your rank with The Woven faction. It can be used to buy Woven Echoes and is needed to respecialize your Weaver Tree.

nodes.name: Necropolis of the Weaver
nodes.description: Rare enemies inside your '{'Tombs'}' and '{'Cemeteries'}' have an additional chance to drop '{'Woven Echoes'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

Cemeteries contain an Altar to the Weaver, where you can insert Woven Echoes into your current Echo Web. In Cemeteries you can collect Memory Amber as well as a Woven Echo when defeating the Altar Guardian boss.

Woven Echoes are echoes in the form of an item that can be placed on a Timeline Echo Web through the Altar of the Weaver.

nodes.name: Bountiful Sarcophagy
nodes.description: Rare enemies in your '{'Tombs'}' and '{'Cemeteries of the Erased'}' have a small chance to drop that timeline's boss specific rewards.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

Cemeteries contain an Altar to the Weaver, where you can insert Woven Echoes into your current Echo Web. In Cemeteries you can collect Memory Amber as well as a Woven Echo when defeating the Altar Guardian boss.

nodes.name: Warden of the Dead
nodes.description: '{'Tombs'}' and '{'Cemeteries of the Erased'}' in your echoes have a chance to include a '{'Possessed Nemesis'}' encounter.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs are side zones able to spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes. Tombs are a good source of collecting Memory Amber and finding Woven Echoes. Completing a Tomb also grants additional Echo rewards.

Cemeteries contain an Altar to the Weaver, where you are able to insert Woven Echoes direct into the Echo Web of your current Timeline. Like Tombs, Cemeteries are also a great source of Memory Amber as well as a guaranteed Woven Echo when defeating the boss guarding the Altar.

Nemeses are encounters that you can choose interact with and fight to claim their items.

nodes.name: Graveyard Prisons
nodes.description: Your '{'Tombs'}' and '{'Cemeteries'}' have a guaranteed '{'Rune Prison'}' with a '{'Posessed Exiled Mage'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

Cemeteries contain an Altar to the Weaver, where you can insert Woven Echoes into your current Echo Web. In Cemeteries you can collect Memory Amber as well as a Woven Echo when defeating the Altar Guardian boss.

Exiled Mages are powerful mages. Free them and slay them to take their experimental items.

nodes.name: Woven Masque
nodes.description: You have a chance for '{'Masque'}' to accompany you in '{'Tombs'}' and '{'Cemeteries'}'. He provides defensive buffs and casts spells at enemies.
nodes.alt_text:
Tombs can spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes, where you can find Memory Amber, Woven Echoes and additional Echo rewards.

Cemeteries contain an Altar to the Weaver, where you can insert Woven Echoes into your current Echo Web. In Cemeteries you can collect Memory Amber as well as a Woven Echo when defeating the Altar Guardian boss.

nodes.name: Darkwoven Threads
nodes.description: '{'Silken Cocoons'}' have a higher chance to contain '{'Incubated Silk'}' in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Incubated Silk is a possessed and trapped soul incubating inside Silken Cocoons that will hunt and kill you.

nodes.name: Reflections of Orobyss
nodes.description:
Completing a '{'Tomb of the Erased'}' or killing a '{'Shade of Orobyss'}' in your echoes has a chance to drop the '{'Confluence of Oblivion'}'.

The '{'Confluence of Oblivion'}' is a woven echo that is guarded by a '{'Gauntlet of Shades'}'.
nodes.alt_text: Tombs are side zones able to spawn in most regular Monolith Echoes. Tombs are a good source of collecting Memory Amber and finding Woven Echoes. Completing a Tomb also grants additional Echo rewards.

nodes.name: Lizard's Inheritance
nodes.description: '{'Loot Lizards'}' in your echoes have a chance to drop a pile of exalted items.
nodes.alt_text: Loot Lizards are creatures that drop items when you attack them. There are several different types of Loot Lizards that carry different items.

nodes.name: Greedy Lizards
nodes.description: '{'Champions'}' have a chance to be accompanied by a '{'Blue'}' or '{'Green Loot Lizard'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
This is unaffected by modifiers to Loot Lizard spawn rate.

Loot Lizards are creatures that drop items when you attack them. There are several different types of Loot Lizards that carry different items.

nodes.name: Scaled Shrines
nodes.description: '{'Loot Lizard'}' shrines are more common in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text:
Increases the amount of shrines that are Loot Lizard shrines rather than increasing the number of shrines.

Loot Lizards are creatures that drop items when you attack them. There are several different types of Loot Lizards that carry different items.

nodes.name: Hidden Scales
nodes.description: Opening a cache in your echoes has a chance to spawn a '{'Loot Lizard'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Caches are found throughout Eterra and the Monolith and when opened offer great rewards.

Loot Lizards are creatures that drop items when you attack them. There are several different types of Loot Lizards that carry different items.

nodes.name: Gilded Tails
nodes.description: '{'Loot Lizards'}' in your echoes always drop a unique item and they have double the chance to drop their tail.
nodes.alt_text: Loot Lizards are creatures that drop items when you attack them. There are several different types of Loot Lizards that carry different items.

nodes.name: Hoarding Reptiles
nodes.description: '{'Loot Lizards'}' spawn more often in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Loot Lizards are creatures that drop items when you attack them. There are several different types of Loot Lizards that carry different items.

nodes.name: Dual Destruction
nodes.description: '{'Champions'}' have a chance to appear in pairs in your Echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Heroic Gauntlet
nodes.description: '{'Champions'}' are much more common in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Echoed Legends
nodes.description: '{'Champions'}' in your echoes have a chance to drop uniques with at least 1 '{'Legendary Potential'}'.
nodes.alt_text: Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Exalted Challenger
nodes.description:
Your echoes have a high chance to spawn a '{'Champion'}'.

Additionally, '{'Champions'}' have a chance to drop additional exalted items in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text: Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Gatekeeper's Bounty
nodes.description: Rare enemies have an additional chance to drop Dungeon Keys and Dungeon Key Charms.

nodes.name: Woven Fortunes
nodes.description: You have a chance for '{'Champions'}' in your regular echoes to drop a pile of '{'Woven Echoes'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

Woven Echoes are echoes in the form of an item that can be placed on a Timeline Echo Web through the Altar of the Weaver.

nodes.name: The Mage Bane
nodes.description: When you open a '{'Rune Prison'}', there is a chance that a '{'Champion'}' will appear to fight the '{'Exiled Mage'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Exiled Mages are powerful mages. Free them and slay them to take their experimental items.

Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Regal Foes
nodes.description: Bosses and '{'Champions'}' in your echoes drop an additional pile of gold and have an additional chance to drop a unique item.
nodes.alt_text: Champions are more formidable Rare Enemies which drop more items and items with affixes tied to their modifiers.

nodes.name: Age of Beasts
nodes.description: '{'Rift Beasts'}' are more common in your echoes.
nodes.alt_text:
Rift Beasts are enemies that gain different abilities depending on how they have evolved.
This node affects both the number of normally occuring Rift Beasts and the number of Rift Beast Ambushes from the '{'Primordial Ambush'}' node.

nodes.name: Riven Gateway
nodes.description: '{'Rift Beasts'}' that emerge from rifts are accompanied by other enemies from the Ancient Era that drop Ancient Bones when slain.
nodes.alt_text:
Rift Beasts are enemies that gain different abilities depending on how they have evolved.
Ancient Bones can be used to purchase items from Skarven Bloodhorn.

nodes.name: Crystal Growth
nodes.description: '{'Rift Beasts'}' have higher chance to have '{'Crystallized Hearts'}', and Rift Beasts with Crystallized Hearts have more health and damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
nodes.alt_text:
Rift Beasts are enemies that gain different abilities depending on how they have evolved.
Rift Beasts that have Crystallized Hearts are more dangerous but drop their Crystallized Heart upon death. 
Crystallized Hearts can be used to purchase items from Skarven Bloodhorn.

nodes.name: Primordial Ambush
nodes.description:
You have a chance to be ambushed by randomly evolved '{'Rift Beasts'}' in your echoes.

These Rift Beasts have a slightly higher chance to drop '{'Primordial Unique Items'}' that cannot be purchased from '{'Skarven Bloodhorn'}'.
nodes.alt_text:
Rift Beasts are enemies that gain different abilities depending on how they have evolved.
The number of evolutions for Ambushing Rift Beasts is random and can vary from 3 to 6 depending in corruption.
Primordial Unique Items are a type of Primordial item. Only one Primordial item can be equipped at a time.

nodes.name: Memories of the Observer
nodes.description:
Most regular echoes in your echo web appear in '{'Echo Chains'}' rather than as single echoes.

Cemeteries and imprinted Woven Echoes appear to the sides of chains rather than inside them.

Beacons no longer appear.
nodes.alt_text: This does not affect the spawn rate of special echo chains, which can be revealed without this node.

nodes.name: Plentiful Windows
nodes.description: Omen Echo Chains are more likely to spawn

nodes.name: Inescapable Omens
nodes.description: Roaming Omens have a chance to spawn in any echo

stats.key: Chance of Roaming Omens to appear in any echo

nodes.name: Omen's Soldiers
nodes.description: Omens have a chance to summon void Champions during Omen Windows encounters

stats.key: Chance for Omens to spawn a void Champion
